title: Timer
description: Adds a simple but customizable timer.
body:
![Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89dffae6083c840802be9944522b69a8337e0878.png)
----
## Timer (simple & customizable)
----

### About
Add a timer to your world—whether you want to stop the clock or set a time limit. You can also customize the appearance of your timer.
Among other things, you can adjust the color and thickness of the text, as well as whether the timer should count up or down.

----
____________ ![Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e06e722efa1b00eb0858cb21831ce72143f392d_0.webp)
----

### How to use
> Start: ```/trigger timer.start```

> Pause: ```/trigger timer.pause```

> Reset: ```/trigger timer.reset```

> Settings: ```/trigger timer.settings```. If you are using the timer for the first time, you may need to rejoin in order to open the settings.
----
### Uninstall
To uninstall, simply open the settings or run the command `/function timer:uninstall`.
